title: The Arrival
sentences: [Annan zhamanum e Yerevan.] Anna arrives in Yerevan.
[Na tesnum e ir unkerojuh՝ Aramin.] She sees her friend, Aram.
[— Barev dzez, — asum e Annan.] — Hello, says Anna.
[— Yes Annan em.] — I am Anna.
[— Bari galust Hayastan, Anna.] — Welcome to Armenia, Anna.
[— Shnorhakalutyun, — zhptum e na.] — Thank you, she smiles.
[— Shat lav em, isk duk?] — I am very well, and you?
[— Yes nuynpes lav em.] — I am also well.
[— Urakh em tsanotanalu hamar.] — Nice to meet you (Glad to get acquainted).
[— Sa dzer tchamprukn e?] — Is this your suitcase?
[— Ayo, sa im tchamprukn e.] — Yes, this is my suitcase.
[— Shat bari, gnantsink.] — Very well, let's go.
[— Vortegh e mekenan?] — Where is the car?
[— Mekenan drsum e, — pataskhanum e Aramuh.] — The car is outside, answers Aram.
dictionary:
Երևան - Yerevan
տեսնել - to see
բարև - hello
ես - I
գալուստ - arrival (բարի գալուստ - welcome)
շնորհակալություն - thank you
ինչպես - how
լավ - good / well
նույնպես - also / too
ուրախ - glad / happy
սա - this
այո - yes
գնալ - to go (գնացինք - let's go)
որտեղ - where
դուրս (դրսում) - outside
